title: Relay QR pairing payload
description: Versioned pairing payload. The JSON document is serialized compactly, encoded as base64url (no padding), and rendered as a QR code. Both apps MUST validate against this schema and reject payloads whose 'v' is unknown.

v.description: Payload schema version. Clients reject values they do not support.

mode.description: Transport mode. 'socks5' = Fast Mode (TCP), 'wireguard' = Full Mode (TCP+UDP).

host.description: Android hotspot gateway IP the client connects to.

port.description: Listening port on the phone (SOCKS5 port in Fast Mode; informational in Full Mode, see wg.endpointPort).

name.description: Optional friendly device label shown in the client UI.

issuedAt.description: Unix seconds at generation time. Informational in v1; reserved for expiry in a future pairing strategy.

wg.description: WireGuard parameters. Present if and only if mode == 'wireguard'.

clientPrivateKey.description: Per-pairing client private key, base64. Discarded on disconnect.

allowedIps.description: Comma-separated CIDR list routed through the tunnel.

endpointPort.description: WireGuard UDP listen port on the phone.

dns.description: DNS server the client should use while tunneled.
